Having read the personas carefully, here is my analysis and proposed modifications.

## The Actual Problem

The convergence is structural, not motivational. All three main debaters share **word-for-word identical Conflict Mandates**. That's the clearest symptom. When everyone uses the same meta-instruction ("find where you disagree"), they all approach conflict the same way — reactively seeking quibbles rather than colliding from incompatible first principles.
